name: loanapp-full-stack
description: Loan Application Platform - Full Stack Development

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && (if exist .env.local (echo .env exists) else (copy .env.example .env.local)) && .\venv\Scripts\python manage.py migrate && .\venv\Scripts\python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev:both: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.dev:backend:windows: cd backend && .\venv\Scripts\python manage.py migrate & .\venv\Scripts\python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000
scripts.test:api: curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/ | jq . || echo 'Waiting for backend...'
scripts.test:ui: timeout 2 curl -s http://localhost:3000 > /dev/null && echo '✓ Frontend running on http://localhost:3000' || echo 'Frontend not available yet'
scripts.test:login: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/auth/token/ -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"admin","password":"admin"}' 2>/dev/null | jq . || echo 'Backend not ready'
scripts.test:health: npm run test:api && npm run test:ui && npm run test:login
